_v035_default_note: DEFAULT service entrypoint is now `recupero-api` (the FastAPI app: operator console at /v1/console + the /v1 API). It serves /healthz (alias of /v1/health) so this healthcheckPath passes. The background WORKER and the cron scheduler run as SEPARATE Railway services pointing at the same repo/Dockerfile, each overriding startCommand to `recupero-worker` and `recupero-cron` respectively. To revert the default to the worker, set startCommand back to `recupero-worker` here AND in the Dockerfile CMD (kept aligned by tests/test_deploy_config_audit.py).
